metadata.persona_summary: RevOps Manager who championed the deal but lost visibility post-handoff

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: What changed between initial interest and not moving forward?

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: What part of security — controls you didn't have, audit log, SSO, or something else?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: Honestly the security review was manageable in the end. I think procurement or vendor consolidation mattered more, but I lost visibility after handoff.

tool_call.output_summary: CRM notes mention competitor bundle proposed at procurement stage and vendor consolidation flagged with no procurement-side detail.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: The CRM mentions a competitor bundle — was the procurement decision tied to consolidating with another vendor?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: Maybe. I'd be guessing — I wasn't in those conversations.

transcript.speaker: system
transcript.text: Methodic logs participant_vague_answer guardrail event for procurement_friction; action mark_ambiguous; measurement intent preserved.

transcript.speaker: methodic
transcript.text: Got it — I'll mark procurement as ambiguous rather than guess. Was there a competitor offer you can confirm?

transcript.speaker: participant
transcript.text: Yes, they mentioned a bundled deal from a competitor we already use elsewhere.
